sections.paragraph:
συνθήκη (συνθήκη, ἡ,)
Etym. συντίθημι

I. a composition, of words and sentences, Luc.

II. a conventional agreement, convention, compact, Plat., Arist.; ἐκ συνθήκης, ex composito, by agreement, Plat.; κατὰ συνθήκην conventionally, Arist.

2. the article of a compact or treaty, Thuc.:—mostly in pl. the articles of agreement, and collectively, a contract, compact, covenant, treaty, Hdt., attic; συνθήκας ποιέεσθαί τινι Hdt., Ar.; ἐκ τῶν συνθηκῶν according to the covenant, Isocr.; κατὰ τὰς ς. Thuc.
